---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new input, output format, threshold mode, or composition
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What do you want?

A one-paragraph description of the feature.

## Why is this useful?

The user problem it solves. Bonus points for linking to a real
use case (a user request, a competitor Agent, etc.).

## Proposed API

Sketch the input / output changes. For example:

```json
{
  "target": "0x...",
  "network": "mainnet",
  "new_input_field": "value"
}
```

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix (runner only)
- [ ] New input field (backwards-compatible)
- [ ] New output field (backwards-compatible)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)
- [ ] New Skill composition (separate repo, but documented here)

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you picked this one.

## Anything else

Mockups, examples, related issues.
